title: Fluent 2 Accessibility
summary: Fluent 2 guidance for inclusive product design, accessible interaction, content, and implementation.
lessons: Include accessibility requirements in design and implementation decisions from the start.
caveats: Platform guidance must be validated against the target operating system and assistive technologies.
licenseNote: Public first-party documentation; cite and synthesize.
antiImitationNote: Adopt inclusive practices, not Microsoft visual identity.
